caption: The video captures a scene at what appears to be a bus station or terminal. A large white and blue bus, labeled "Esteban Rivas," is parked near a boarding ramp. The bus has a sign indicating it offers "Kilómetros de calidad" (kilometers of quality) and provides a contact number. Passengers are seen boarding the bus via the ramp, with one individual clearly visible walking up the steps. The setting includes modern architecture with glass panels and metal structures, suggesting an urban environment. The presence of other vehicles and barriers indicates a well-organized transportation hub. The overall atmosphere suggests a routine day with people traveling or commuting.
